description_long: This house features a grand, classical facade with tall arched windows and decorative columns supporting a covered entryway. The front includes a double garage with window boxes, and the main entrance is accentuated by a small set of steps and ornate railings. The side and rear of the house reveal a curved balcony with wrought iron railings, overlooking a stone-tiled patio area. The upper story is defined by a series of large, symmetrically arranged windows, while the lower level includes multiple access points and a mix of stone and stucco finishes. The roof is predominantly flat, with a slight parapet and minimal overhangs, giving the structure a stately, Mediterranean-inspired appearance. Interior spaces are partially visible, showing a mix of open rooms and partitioned areas, with some rooms featuring rich wood paneling and patterned flooring.
description: A stately, Mediterranean-style house with arched windows, decorative columns, a curved balcony, and a double garage. The exterior combines stucco and stone finishes with ornate railings and a flat roof.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entry with columns, and window boxes above the garage doors.
description_view_1: Curved balcony and arched windows dominate this side, with ornate railings and a stone-tiled patio below.
description_view_2: Rear and side view highlighting symmetrical window placement, a secondary entry, and a mix of stucco and stone finishes.
description_view_3: Back view with a flat roof, visible room partitions, and minimal exterior detailing.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large arched windows and regular rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features double doors, decorative columns, a small set of steps, and an overhanging portico with ornamental railings.
